description: A customer's order contains one item that is on backorder. The agent needs to ship the in-stock items now and the backordered item later.

nodes.task_description: Identify the order containing both in-stock and backordered items.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the order and confirms the stock status of each item.

nodes.task_description: Split the order into two separate shipments in the order management system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates two shipment records from the single order.

nodes.task_description: Process the shipment for the in-stock items immediately.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a shipping label for the first part of the order.
